scenarios.name: express-hash-chain-audit
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets all rubric requirements, while Response B uses a constraint instead of a trigger to block UPDATE/DELETE, missing that key element.

scenarios.name: aws-cloudtrail-immutable-s3-hipaa
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric with correct 6‑year compliance retention, log validation, and HIPAA reference, while Response A omits the 6‑year retention, validation, and HIPAA mention.
